Hope you can enjoy some of them, feel free to grab a copy.

Developer events April-May centered on the web and web technologies
full_text:
Hey! I compiled and curated a list of developer events for April-May, they are centered on European events in person and are all about the current web paradigm changes or relevant technological innovation.

Hope you can enjoy some of them, feel free to grab a copy.

 

 
 

 Developer events April-May centered on the web and web technologies
 
 
 

 

Developer conferences - April-May 2026

CityJS London 2026

Conference website
CityJS

Presentation
This event in central London presents all the latest innovations on the web from the AI bubble to vibe coding and new tooling changes.

Dates
15-17 April 2026

Key speakers
35+ speakers

David Whitney from NewDay - The future of the AI bubble

Robin Ginn from OpenJS Foundation- Silicon Valley is Optional. Github is not

Kitze from Sizzy - From Vibe Coding to Vibe Engineering

Sara Vieira (Senior Frontend Developer) - Main stage MC

Tejas Kumar from IBM - The New UX

And many more ...

Event breakdown

First day mixes free meetups, speakers and workshops

Second day is split between professional and free workshops

Third day is a full conference day

Product Weekend Builders - Lisbon

Conference website
Product Weekend - Builders

Presentation
Product Circle presents their workshop tailored for product managers facing the challenges of today's…
 
 

If you would like to hear more content like this or case studies

feel free to reach here
